english translation text: In the name of Allah, the Beneficent, the Merciful.

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: O Allah, bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.

arabic text: اللّهُمَّ رَبَّ شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ الَّذِي أَنْزَلْتَ فِيهِ الْقُرْآنَ،
english translation text: O Allah, Lord of Ramadhan, in which You sent down the Qur’an
and made fasting obligatory on Your servants.
Bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad,
and bless me to go for pilgrimage to Your sacred House,

arabic text: فِي الْعَامِ هذَا وَفِي كُلِّ عَامٍ،
english translation text: in this year and in every year,
and forgive me those great sins (that I have committed),

arabic text: فَإنَّهُ لا يَغْفِرُهَا غَيْرُكَ يَا رَحْمنُ يَا عَلاَّمُ.
english translation text: for surely, none can forgive them except You, O Beneficent, O All­-Knowing.

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: O Allah, bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.
